vehicles.slot: Center display (touchscreen) — Car Status > Service > Tow Mode. Physical selector override near column stalk.
shift: PREFERRED: Touchscreen — Car Status > Service > Tow Mode. This safely engages Neutral and disables parking brake.
MANUAL: locate column-mounted gear selector (stalk). Push or rotate to N.
WITHOUT POWER: connect 12V jump pack to under-hood 12V terminals. Restore power, then use touchscreen or stalk.
neutral: 12V battery: accessible under hood via jump terminal points (positive under cover, negative at chassis ground).
Use touchscreen: Car Status > Service > Tow Mode.
FLATBED ONLY — electric drivetrain. NEVER touch orange HV cables.
vehicles.notes: FLATBED ONLY. Tow Mode via touchscreen. 12V auxiliary under hood.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V only — NEVER touch orange HV battery cables.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — electric drivetrain. FWD, RWD, or AWD depending on variant — all are flatbed only.
towNotes: Electric drivetrain — flatbed only on all variants.
Tow Mode on touchscreen is the correct neutral method.
Contact Polestar Customer Support if Tow Mode unavailable and vehicle cannot be powered.

epb.override: Restore 12V via under-hood terminals. Tow Mode on touchscreen releases EPB. No confirmed manual cable override.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood 12V terminals.
Touchscreen: Car Status > Service > Tow Mode.
Tow Mode releases EPB and engages Neutral.
If unavailable: contact Polestar support. Use wheel skates on rear.

battery.location: Under hood — 12V auxiliary jump terminal access points
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: positive under plastic cover (+), negative at chassis ground (−)
battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. 12V only. Never touch orange HV system.

knownIssues.title: Tow Mode via Touchscreen Is the Correct Method
knownIssues.detail: Polestar 2 requires Tow Mode to be activated via the center touchscreen (Car Status > Service > Tow Mode) for safe neutral and EPB release. Using the column stalk alone may allow the vehicle to re-engage drive. Always use Tow Mode.

knownIssues.title: FLATBED ONLY — All Variants
knownIssues.detail: All Polestar 2 variants (Standard Range FWD, Long Range Single Motor, Long Range Dual Motor AWD, Performance AWD) are electric drivetrains. Towing with any driven wheels on the ground risks motor damage. Flatbed is the only method.

vehicles.slot: Center display touchscreen — same Tow Mode path as Polestar 2
shift: Touchscreen: Car Status > Service > Tow Mode.
Physical selector or stalk for N if powered.
Without power: connect 12V jump pack under hood.
vehicles.notes: FLATBED ONLY. AWD electric. Same Tow Mode as Polestar 2.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V only. AWD electric — no exceptions.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Tow Mode on touchscreen releases EPB.
